title: Test Edge 5 (Multi-Input Merge)
cap_description: Merge node2 and node3 inputs into single node5 output
documentation:
## Purpose

Internal test cap. Exercises multi-input merge behavior by combining two independent text inputs (node2 and node3) into a single node5 output.

## Inputs

- A node2 text file (first input).
- A node3 text file path (second input, positional).
- An optional separator between the two merged texts (default: space).

## Outputs

A single merged node5 text.

## Notes

- Not for production use. Used only in capfab test scenarios to verify multi-input routing and merging.

args.arg_description: Path to the first input text file (node2)
Path to the second input text file (node3)
